case_title: ERNESTO ANTONIO RODRIGUEZ VS. GLM PAINTING COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY THIRD PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER

LAW AND MOTION 302, THIRD PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONERS MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED AND IGNORED TO EMAIL COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG BY 5PM ON MARCH 22. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgemnt; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT.
Appearances: Elliot Beckelman (703.4877) for moving party the State Labor Commissioner; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Mtn To Vacate Judgmnt
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
THIRD PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONERS MOTION To Vacate Judgment is taken off-calendar. The moving party failed and ignored to email courtesy copies of the moving papers to contestdept302tr@sftc.org by 5pm on March 22. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =302/HK
